settings.text: Email support@example.com or fill the form below. We reply within 24 hours on business days.

settings.heading: Drop by our studio.
settings.body: Open Monday to Friday, 10am–6pm IST. Walk-ins welcome — but we appreciate a heads-up.

settings.question: How do I track my order?
settings.answer: You’ll receive tracking via email. You can also check your account.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: 3–7 business days within India. Free above ₹999.

settings.question: Do you support Razorpay/UPI?
settings.answer: Yes — UPI, cards, netbanking, EMI and wallets are all supported via Razorpay.
